det_check_template:
proof fn det_get_thread(self_: ProcessManager, thread_ptr: ThreadPtr, r1: &Thread, r2: &Thread)
    requires (self_.wf()), (self_.thread_dom().contains(thread_ptr)),
    ensures
        ({
            &&& (r1 == self_.get_thread(thread_ptr))
            &&& (self_.proc_dom().contains(r1.owning_proc))
            &&& (self_.container_dom().contains(r1.owning_container))
            &&& (self_.get_container(r1.owning_container).scheduler.wf())
            &&& (self_.get_container(r1.owning_container).owned_procs.wf())
            &&& (self_.get_container(r1.owning_container).children.wf())
            &&& (r2 == self_.get_thread(thread_ptr))
            &&& (self_.proc_dom().contains(r2.owning_proc))
            &&& (self_.container_dom().contains(r2.owning_container))
            &&& (self_.get_container(r2.owning_container).scheduler.wf())
            &&& (self_.get_container(r2.owning_container).owned_procs.wf())
            &&& (self_.get_container(r2.owning_container).children.wf())
        }) ==> det_get_thread_equal(r1, r2),
{
{ASSUMES}}
